title: Season status chip
description: Compact HeroUI `Chip` showing a Season's lifecycle status with color-coded variant. Rendered in the season list, season-picker inline row, and season-summary widget. Variant map: planned=neutral, registration_open=info, in_progress=accent, playoffs=warning, completed=success, archived=neutral.

variant.$expr: ({ planned: 'neutral', registration_open: 'info', in_progress: 'accent', playoffs: 'warning', completed: 'success', archived: 'neutral' })[props.status]

children.$expr: ({ planned: 'Planned', registration_open: 'Registration open', in_progress: 'In progress', playoffs: 'Playoffs', completed: 'Completed', archived: 'Archived' })[props.status]
